summary: Nice mellow Jerry show with standout Iko, Jack Straw and He's Gone; recording quality not specified
review: The reviewer enjoyed a relaxed Sunday night performance where Jerry stayed in a mellow groove and the band let I Know You Rider, Jack Straw and He's Gone shine. No specific comments on the audio source were made, but the positive 4‑star rating suggests an acceptable listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; it praises the musical performance strongly (70% weight) but gives no details on recording quality, so rating leans toward a solid show with assumed decent audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Relaxed Sunday night vibe with Jerry in a mellow mode; the highlighted songs carry the momentum.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mellow, relaxed playing noted by reviewer
